name: Taunie | Your Rival Comes On a Little Strong!
description: Ima be so real, I can't remember any actual quotes from her lmao, I've been up all night playing the game and wanted to make an updated, slightly more accurate version of her! Here's the new and improved Taunie bot! I won't be taking the other one down, so you can do the flirty one too! Hope y'all enjoy, and I'll be remaking Lida bot too, since that one was like a month or two ago now, but surprisingly, I got her personality pretty accurately in that one!
creator: Evetstino
